Alamut Castle falls to the Mongols. Tusi: Alamut Castle ta shiga hannun Mongols. Tusi ya shiga aikin sarkin Mongol Hulagu Khan.
Construction begins on the Maragheh obse: An fara ginin Maragheh observatory karkashin jagorancin Tusi.
Completes his major work on ethics, Akhl: Ya kammala babban aikinsa a kan tarbiyya, Akhlaq-i Nasiri (The Nasirean Ethics).
The Maragheh observatory team completes: Kungiyar Maragheh observatory ta kammala shahararren tsarin taswirar taurari, Zij-i Ilkhani.
Dies in Kadhimiya, near Baghdad, and is: Ya mutu a Kadhimiya, kusa da Baghdad, sannan aka binne shi a wani masallaci kusa da Imam na Shia na bakwai.
Founded and directed the most advanced a: Ya kafa kuma ya jagoranci observatory mafi cigaba a zamaninsa, wanda ya janyo manyan masana daga daukacin duniya.
A mathematical theorem that generates li: Wata theorem ta lissafi wadda ke samar da tafiya ta madaidaiciya (linear motion) daga hadin gwiwar tafiye-tafiye na zagaye guda biyu, wadda Copernicus ya yi amfani da ita daga baya.
A highly accurate set of astronomical ta: Tsarin taswirar taurari mai inganci sosai wanda ke nuna motsin taurari, wanda ya zama tsarin da aka fi amfani da shi na tsawon karni da dama.
A seminal work on ethics that synthesize: Babban aiki a kan tarbiyya wanda ke hada tunanin Aristotelian, Platonic, da na Musulunci, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan falsafar Musulunci na tsawon tsararraki.
Was Tusi really a prisoner of the Assass: Shin da gaske ne Tusi ya kasance dan yarin Assassins?
He initially sought refuge with them but: A farko ya nemi tsari a wurinsu amma daga baya aka hana shi fita, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi dan yari gaba daya. Sai dai, an kula da shi a matsayin masani, ba wai dan yari na talakawa ba, kuma ya sami damar ci gaba da ayyukansa na kimiyya da falsafa.
How did Tusi influence Copernicus?: Yaya Tusi ya yi tasiri a kan Copernicus?
Tusi's mathematical model, the 'Tusi cou: Tsarin lissafi na Tusi, watau 'Tusi couple,' ya bayyana a cikin babban aikin Copernicus, De revolutionibus. Ana amfani da shi don musanya equant na Ptolemy. Ana yin muhawara a kan ko Copernicus ya koya game da shi ne ta hanyar rubuce-rubucen Byzantine ko na Larabci, amma kamanceceniya ta lissafi ba ta da tantama.
What fields did Tusi contribute to?: Wadanne fannoni ne Tusi ya ba da gudunmawa a kai?
He was a true polymath who made signific: Ya kasance masani na gaske (polymath) wanda ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga sararin samaniya, lissafi (musamman trigonometry), falsafa, tarbiyya, dabara (logic), optics, likitanci, da kuma addini. Ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 150 a rayuwarsa.
What was his role in the Mongol invasion: Menene rawarsa a lokacin mamayar Mongol?
When the Mongols besieged the Assassin f: Lokacin da Mongols suka kewaye sansanin Alamut na Assassin, Tusi ya taimaka wajen tattaunawar mika wuya cikin zaman lafiya. Iliminsa da hikimarsa sun burge sarkin Mongol Hulagu Khan, wanda ya nada shi a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan kimiyya, wanda ya kare rayuwarsa sannan ya ba shi damar cimma manyan nasarorinsa.
Defeats Egyptians at the Battle of Carch: Ya kayar da mutanen Egypt a Yakin Carchemish; ya hau karagar mulki ta Babylon.
First siege of Jerusalem. Deports King J: Kewaye Jerusalem na farko. Ya tura Sarki Jehoiachin da sauran manyan mutane zuwa Babylon.
Second siege of Jerusalem. Destroys the: Kewaye Jerusalem na biyu. Ya lalata birnin da Haikalin Suleiman (Solomon's Temple), wanda ya fara Babylonian Captivity.
Conducts a 13-year siege of the city of: Ya gudanar da kewaye birnin Tyre na tsawon shekaru 13.
Reigns as king, overseeing massive const: Ya yi mulki a matsayin sarki, yana kula da manyan ayyukan gine-gine a Babylon, ciki har da Ishtar Gate.
Dies in Babylon, succeeded by his son Am: Ya mutu a Babylon, inda dansa Amel-Marduk ya gaje shi.
Conquest of Judah and Destruction of Jer: Cin Kasa ta Judah da Lalata Jerusalem
He crushed the Kingdom of Judah, destroy: Ya murkushe Masarautar Judah, ya lalata Haikalin Suleiman sannan ya tura mutanenta gudun hijira, wani muhimmiyar al'amari a tarihin Yahudawa.
He transformed Babylon into the largest: Ya sauya Babylon ta zama birni mafi girma da ban sha'awa a zamaninsa, inda ya gina Ishtar Gate da kuma ziggurat na Etemenanki.
He secured the Neo-Babylonian Empire's d: Ya tabbatar da ikon Daular Neo-Babylonian a fadin Near East bayan ya kayar da sojojin Egypt da na Assyria a Carchemish.
Did Nebuchadnezzar really build the Hang: Shin da gaske ne Nebuchadnezzar ya gina Hanging Gardens of Babylon?
While ancient writers like Berossus cred: Duk da cewa marubuta na da kamar Berossus sun ba shi girmamawa na gina Hanging Gardens ga matarsa, babu wata hujja ta tarihi ta gaske ko kuma rubutun Babylon na lokacin da ya tabbatar da wanzuwarsu. Labarinsu ya kasance bangare na tatsuniya na mulkinsa.
Why is he so prominent in the Bible?: Me yasa yake da babban matsayi a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki?
He is a central antagonist in the Old Te: Ya kasance babban abokin gaba a cikin Old Testament saboda cin Jerusalem da yaki, lalata Haikali na Farko, da kuma tilasta wa Yahudawa shiga Babylonian Captivity. Littafin Daniel kuma ya nuna shi sosai, inda ya yi bayani kan alakarsa da annabi Daniel da kuma lokacin haukarsa da ake zargi.
What was his relationship with the god M: Yaya alakar sa take da allahn Marduk?
As king of Babylon, Nebuchadnezzar was t: A matsayinya na sarkin Babylon, Nebuchadnezzar shi ne babban bawan Marduk, allahn da ke kare birnin. Rubuce-rubucensa galibi suna ba wa Marduk girmamawa ga nasarorinsa sannan suna bayyana gagarumin ginin haikali da ya yi a matsayin ayyukan ibada don girmama allahn.
Born Abu Ali Hasan ibn Ali Tusi in Tus,: An haife shi a matsayin Abu Ali Hasan ibn Ali Tusi a Tus, Persia.
Appointed as vizier to the Seljuk Sultan: An nada shi a matsayin vizier ga Sultan na Seljuk Alp Arslan.
Secures the throne for Malik-Shah I afte: Ya tabbatar da karagar mulki ga Malik-Shah I bayan kisan Alp Arslan, wanda ya sanya shi zama mutum mafi iko a daular.
Founds the Nizamiyyah schools across the: Ya kafa makarantun Nizamiyyah a daukacin daular, inda mafi shahara a cikinsu aka kafa ta a Baghdad a shekarar 1065.
Writes the Siyasatnama (Book of Governme: Ya rubuta Siyasatnama (Book of Government), babban aiki a kan gudanar da mulki.
Assassinated near Nahavand, Persia, beli: An kashe shi kusa da Nahavand, Persia, wanda ake amanna cewa wani mamban kungiyar Order of Assassins ne ya yi kisan.
He created a powerful centralized bureau: Ya samar da tsarin gudanarwa mai karfi a tsakiya wanda ya hada yankuna masu yawa da daban-daban na Daular Seljuk.
He established a network of state-sponso: Ya kafa hanyoyin jami'o'i da gwamnati ke daukar nauyi (Nizamiyyahs) wadanda suka zama manyan cibiyoyin ilimi da na gudanarwa.
He wrote the 'Book of Government' (Siyas: Ya rubuta 'Book of Government' (Siyasatnama), wani babban rubutu a kan tsarin siyasa da gudanar da mulki a duniyar Musulunci.
They were a system of higher education i: Sun kasance tsarin jami'o'i na ilimi mai zurfi wadanda Nizam al-Mulk ya kafa. Sun inganta ilimin addini da dokar Sunni na Musulunci, sun horar da jami'an gwamnati na gaba, sannan sun yaki ra'ayoyi masu hamayya.
Why was Nizam al-Mulk assassinated?: Me yasa aka kashe Nizam al-Mulk?
While the Order of Assassins (Hashshashi: Kodayake ana zargin Order of Assassins (Hashshashin) a hukumance, babban ikonsa ya haifar da abokan gaba da yawa a fadar sarki, ciki har da ministoci masu hamayya da mambobin dangin sarakuna, wadanda kila suna da hannu a ciki.
The 'Siyasatnama' or 'Book of Government: 'Siyasatnama' ko 'Book of Government' wani littafi ne a kan sarauta da gudanar da mulki. Yana ba wa sarakuna shawara a kan adalci, gudanarwa, ladabi na fada, da kuma yadda za su fuskanci barazana ta ciki da ta waje.
Seizes the throne of the Achaemenid Empi: Ya kwace karagar mulki ta Daular Achaemenid bayan ya hambarar da mai kwace mulki Gaumata.
Suppresses widespread revolts across the: Ya murkushe bore a ko'ina a daukacin daular.
Begins work on the Behistun Inscription: Ya fara aiki a kan Behistun Inscription don tabbatar da mulkinsa.
Begins construction of the new ceremonia: Ya fara ginin sabon babban birnin girmamawa, Persepolis.
Launches an unsuccessful campaign agains: Ya kaddamar da yakin soja da bai yi nasara ba yaki da Scythians a Turai.
The Ionian Revolt begins, marking the st: Bore na Ionian ya fara, wanda ke nuna farkon Yakin Greco-Persian.
The first Persian invasion of Greece end: Mamayar farko ta Persian a Greece ta zo karshe da rashin nasara a Yakin Marathon.
Dies in Persia while preparing a second: Ya mutu a Persia lokacin da yake shirin tafiyar soja ta biyu yaki da Greece.
Divided the empire into provinces (satra: Ya raba daular zuwa larduna (satrapies), inda kowanne ke karkashin jami'an da ke ba shi rahoto kai-tsaye gare shi, wanda ya tabbatar da iko a tsakiya.
Constructed a 2,700 km highway from Susa: Ya gina babban titin kilomita 2,700 daga Susa zuwa Sardis, wanda ya ba da damar sadarwa cikin sauri da kuma motsin sojoji ta hanyar gidajen aikewa (postal stations).
Introduced the gold daric and silver sil: Ya shigo da daric na zinariya da siglos na azurfa, wanda ya samar da tsarin tattalin eko dunkulalle a fadin babbar daula.
Initiated the building of the grand cere: Ya fara ginin babban birnin girmamawa, wanda ke nuna dukiya, iko, da al'adu daban-daban na Daular Achaemenid.
Was Darius related to Cyrus the Great?: Shin Darius yana da alaka da Cyrus Mai Girma?
Distantly. Darius belonged to a collater: Ba sosai ba. Darius ya kasance a cikin wani reshe daban na daular Achaemenid. Ya karfafa ikirarin mulkinsa ta hanyar auren Atossa, yar Cyrus Mai Girma.
A massive multilingual inscription carve: Babban rubutu na harsuna daban-daban da aka zana a kan bango, wanda ke nuna yadda Darius ya hau karagar mulki. Ya kasance muhimmiyar kashi ta tallan sarki sannan yana da matukar mahimmanci ga fahimtar rubutun cuneiform na zamani.
Did Darius conquer Greece?: Shin Darius ya ci Greece da yaki?
No. His first invasion was famously defe: A'a. Shahararren mamayarsa na farko ya fuskanci kashi a Yakin Marathon a shekarar 490 BCE. Ya mutu kafin ya kaddamar da mamaya ta biyu mafi girma, wadda aka bar wa dansa, Xerxes I.
Born in al-Qalamoun, near Tripoli, in Ot: An haife shi a al-Qalamoun, kusa da Tripoli, a Ottoman Syria.
Moved to Cairo, Egypt, to collaborate wi: Ya koma Alkahira, Egypt, don yin aiki tare da Muhammad Abduh.
Founded the influential journal Al-Manar: Ya kafa jarida mai tasiri Al-Manar (The Lighthouse).
Following Abduh's death, he became the l: Bayan mutuwar Abduh, ya zama babban murya na yunkurin Islamic Modernist.
Founded the 'Society for Preaching and G: Ya kafa 'Society for Preaching and Guidance' a Alkahira.
Elected President of the Syrian National: An zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Syrian National Congress.
The abolition of the Ottoman Caliphate d: Soke Daular Ottoman (Ottoman Caliphate) ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunaninsa na siyasa na baya.
Published the influential journal Al-Man: Ya buga jarida mai tasiri Al-Manar na tsawon shekaru sama da 35, wadda ta yada ra'ayoyin gyaran Musulunci a daukacin duniyar Musulunci.
Authored a monumental commentary on the: Ya rubuta sharhi mai girma a kan Alkur'ani, Tafsir al-Manar, inda ya ci gaba da aikin da Muhammad Abduh ya fara.
Synthesized the modernist ideas of Abduh: Ya hada ra'ayoyin modernism na Abduh da ka'idojin Salafism, wanda ya samar da tsarin ilimi na musamman da kuma mai tasiri.
What is Salafism, as Rida understood it?: Menene Salafism, kamar yadda Rida ya fahimta?
For Rida, Salafism meant returning to th: Ga Rida, Salafism na nufin komawa ga ayyuka da bangaskiya na 'magabata nagari' (the Salaf al-Salih), tsararraki uku na farko na Musulmai, a matsayin mafi tsarkin tsari na Musulunci, don gyara addinin daga abubuwan da aka kara daga baya da kuma camfi.
How did his views on the Caliphate chang: Yaya ra'ayinsa a kan Caliphate ya sauya?
Initially a supporter of the Ottoman Cal: A farko ya kasance mai goyon bayan Ottoman Caliphate, soke ta a shekarar 1924 ya sa ya yi tunani a kan sabon tsari na kasar Musulunci, watau 'Islamic Caliphate' bisa shawara (shura) kuma karkashin jagorancin sarki mai cancanta, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Islamist na baya.
What was his relationship with Arab nati: Yaya alakar sa take da kishin kasa na Larabawa (Arab nationalism)?
It was complex. He supported Arab autono: Tana da sarkakiya. Ya goyi bayan cin gashin kansa na Larabawa daga Ottoman Turks sannan ya jagoranci Syrian National Congress, amma biyayyarsa ta karshe tana ga hadin kai na Ummah (al'umma) ta Musulunci fiye da kishin kasa na yare.
Reza Khan is born in Alasht, Mazandaran: An haifi Reza Khan a Alasht, lardin Mazandaran, Persia.
Leads a coup d'état with the Persian Cos: Ya jagoranci juyin mulki tare da Persian Cossack Brigade, inda ya zama Ministan Yaki.
Is voted Shah by the Majlis (parliament): Majlis (majalisa) ta zabe shi a matsayin Shah, wanda ya kawo karshen daular Qajar sannan ya kafa daular Pahlavi.
Officially requests foreign nations to u: Ya nemi kasashen waje a hukumance su yi amfani da sunan 'Iran' maimakon 'Persia' a cikin rubuce-rubuce na hukuma.
Establishes the University of Tehran, a: Ya kafa Jami'ar Tehran, wadda take zama ginshikin gyare-gyaren iliminsa.
Issues the 'Kashf-e hijab' decree, contr: Ya kaddamar da dokar 'Kashf-e hijab', wadda ta haramta duk wani lullubi (veil) a fili cikin cece-kuce.
Is forced to abdicate by the Anglo-Sovie: An tilasta masa sauka daga mulki sakamakon mamayar Anglo-Soviet a Iran lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.
Dies in exile in Johannesburg, South Afr: Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Johannesburg, South Africa.
He overthrew the Qajar dynasty and estab: Ya hambarar da daular Qajar sannan ya kafa tasa, inda ya yi mulki a matsayin Shah na farko na layin Pahlavi daga shekarar 1925 zuwa 1941.
He initiated large-scale industrial proj: Ya kaddamar da manyan ayyuka na masana'antu, ya gina ababen more rayuwa na kasa kamar Titin Jirgin Kasa na Trans-Iranian, sannan ya gyara tsarin soja, shari'a, da na ilimi.
Secularization and Westernization: Raba Addini da Gwamnati da Zamanantarwa da salon Yamma
He implemented policies to reduce the po: Ya aiwatar da manufofi don rage ikon limamai (clergy), ya inganta ilimi na zamani (secular education), sannan ya tilasta tsarin sutura na Yamma don zamanantar da al'umma.
Yes, he was the Shah of Iran. 'Shah' is: E, shi ne Shah na Iran. 'Shah' lakabi ne na Farsi ga sarki.
Why did he change the country's name fro: Me yasa ya canza sunan kasar daga Persia zuwa Iran?
In 1935, he requested that foreign natio: A shekarar 1935, ya nemi kasashen waje su yi amfani da sunan 'Iran', sunan gida na kasar, don nuna rabuwa da baya da kuma tabbatar da asalin kasa na zamani a duniya.
What was his relationship with the Allie: Yaya alakar sa take da dakarun Allied da Axis lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu (WWII)?
He declared Iran's neutrality in WWII bu: Ya shelanta cewa Iran ba ta da bangare a Yakin Duniya na Biyu amma dakarun Allied sun zarge shi da tausayawa Jamus ta Nazi. Wannan zargi, tare da mahimmancin dabarar Iran, ya kai ga mamayar Anglo-Soviet a shekarar 1941 sannan an tilasta masa sauka daga mulki.
Born in Mardinu, Babylonia, within the P: An haife shi a Mardinu, Babylonia, a cikin Daular Parthian.
Receives his first revelation from his s: Ya sami wahayinsa na farko daga tagwayensa na ruhaniya, watau Syzygos.
Receives his second revelation, commandi: Ya sami wahayinsa na biyu, wanda ke ba shi umarnin fara aikinsa a fili.
Travels to the Kushan Empire in modern-d: Ya tafi Daular Kushan a Afghanistan da India ta yanzu, inda ya fuskanci tunanin Buddhist.
Returns to Persia and is granted an audi: Ya koma Persia sannan aka ba shi damar tattaunawa da sabon Sarkin Sasanian, Shapur I, inda ya sami goyon bayansa.
Preaches and spreads his religion throug: Ya yi wa'azi sannan ya yada addininsa a daukacin Daular Sasanian da sauran wurare karkashin kariyar sarki.
Accused of heresy by the Zoroastrian cle: Malaman addini na Zoroastrian sun zarge shi da bidi'a, inda aka tsare shi sannan aka kashe shi da umarnin Sarki Bahram I.
Created a major gnostic world religion t: Ya samar da wani babban addini na duniya na gnostic wanda ke hada abubuwan Zoroastrian, Kirista, da kuma Buddhist sannan ya yadu daga Rome zuwa China.
Authored several holy books, including t: Ya rubuta littattafai masu tsarki da dama, ciki har da Shabuhragan, wadanda aka zana su da kyau don isar da sakonsa.
Organized a structured church with a cle: Ya tsara coci mai tsari tare da bayyananniyar manufa ta mishan (missionary goal) don samar da addini guda daya na duniya ga daukacin bil'adama, wanda ya wuce iyakokin al'adu da na yare.
Manichaeism is a radically dualistic rel: Manichaeism addini ne na musamman na dualistic wanda ke imanin cewa sararin samaniya filin yaki ne tsakanin duniyar ruhaniya mai kyau ta Haske da kuma duniyar jiki mummuna ta Duhu.
Why did Manichaeism eventually disappear: Me yasa Manichaeism ta bace a karshe?
It faced intense and sustained persecuti: Ta fuskanci zalunci mai tsanani da dorewa daga addinan kasa masu hamayya kamar Zoroastrianism, Roman Christianity, da kuma daga baya, Musulunci, wanda ya kai ga raguwarta a hankali da kuma bacewarta gaba daya a karni na 16.
Yes, Mani was a renowned artist and scri: E, Mani ya kasance shahararren mai zane da marubuci. Ya yi imanin cewa fasaha ita ce hanya mafi mahimmanci don isar da sakonsa na Allah, kuma rubuce-rubucen Manichaean sun kasance sanannu da kyau sannan suna da daraja sosai.
Today, the adjective 'Manichaean' is oft: A yau, ana yawan amfani da kalmar 'Manichaean' don bayyana kowane ra'ayi na duniya wanda ke kallon abubuwa a cikin tsari mai sauki, a matsayin abu mai kyau gaba daya yaki da mummuna gaba daya.
Ascends to the throne after the overthro: Ya hau karagar mulki bayan hambarar da dan uwansa, Mustafa IV.
The 'Auspicious Incident' (Vaka-i Hayriy: The 'Auspicious Incident' (Vaka-i Hayriye), inda ya soke kungiyar Janissary.
The Treaty of Adrianople concludes the R: Yarjejeniyar Adrianople ta kammala Yakin Russo-Turkish, wadda ta ba wa Serbia da Greece ikon cin gashin kai.
Establishes the first official Ottoman n: Ya kafa jaridar Ottoman ta farko ta hukumance, Takvim-i Vekayi (Calendar of Events).
Dies of tuberculosis, shortly before his: Ya mutu sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis), jim kadan kafin a shelanta Edict of Gülhane (bangaren Tanzimat) da ya tsara.
Eliminated the powerful, conservative mi: Ya kawar da rundunar soja mai karfi kuma ta gargajiya wadda ta dade tana kawo cikas ga zamanantarwa da kuma sarrafa siyasa.
Established the 'Asakir-i Mansure-i Muha: Ya kafa 'Asakir-i Mansure-i Muhammediye' (Sojoji Masu Nasara na Muhammad), rundunar soja ta zamani irin ta Turai.
Replaced traditional advisory councils (: Ya musanya majalissun shawara na gargajiya (Divan) da ma'aikatun irin na Turai don tsara ikon kasa a tsakiya.
Initiated the legal and social reforms t: Ya kaddamar da gyare-gyaren shari'a da na al'umma wadanda za a tattara su a cikin dokar Tanzimat (Tanzimat Edict), wadda ke inganta daidaito tsakanin mutanen Ottoman.
Why were the Janissaries so opposed to r: Me yasa Janissaries suka nuna adawa da gyare-gyare haka?
The Janissaries had evolved from an elit: Janissaries sun sauya daga dakarun yaki na musamman zuwa karfin siyasa da na tattalin arziki mai karfi, kuma sun kalli gyare-gyare a matsayin barazana kai-tsaye ga gatansu da tasirinsu.
\"Tanzimat\" is Turkish for \"reorganiza: 'Tanzimat' harshen Turkish ne na 'sake tsari.' Yana nuni ga lokacin gyare-gyare mai zurfi a Daular Usmaniyya daga shekarar 1839 zuwa 1876, wanda mulkin Mahmud II ya fara.
It was the event in 1826 where Mahmud II: Ya kasance al'amari a shekarar 1826 inda Mahmud II ya yi amfani da dakarunsa na bindigogi masu aminci don murkushe boren Janissary, wanda ya kai ga lalacewa da soke kungiyar gaba daya, wanda hakan ya kawar da babban cikas ga gyare-gyarensa.
Did Mahmud II's reforms succeed?: Shin gyare-gyaren Mahmud II sun yi nasara?
They were a mixed success. While he laid: Sun kasance nasara mai gauraya. Duk da cewa ya kafa ginshiki mai mahimmanci na zamanantar da kasa da soja, daular ta ci gaba da fuskanci asarar yankuna da kuma rikici na ciki, kuma galibi ana fuskantar tirjiya ga gyare-gyaren.
Born in Edirne, the Ottoman capital at t: An haife shi a Edirne, babban birnin Ottoman a lokacin.
First ascends the throne at age 12 after: Ya fara hawa karagar mulki yana da shekaru 12 bayan mahaifinsa ya sauka, amma an cire shi aka mayar da mahaifinsa sakamakon makircin fada da barazana ta waje.
Ascends the throne for the second time u: Ya hau karagar mulki a karo na biyu bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Murad II.
Conquers Constantinople after a 53-day s: Ya ci Constantinople da yaki bayan an kewaye ta na tsawon kwanaki 53, wanda ya kawo karshen Daular Byzantine sannan ya mayar da ita babban birnin Ottoman, watau Istanbul.
Conquers the Empire of Trebizond, the la: Ya ci Daular Trebizond da yaki, kasar magajiya ta Byzantine ta karshe mai girma.
Wages a long and costly war with the Rep: Ya yi yaki mai tsayi da tsada da Republic of Venice don ikon tekunan Aegean da Adriatic.
Compiles the 'Kanunname,' a code of laws: Ya tattara 'Kanunname,' dokar kasa wadda ta tsara iko a tsakiya sannan ta tsara tsarin kasar Ottoman na tsawon karni da dama.
Dies suddenly during a new military camp: Ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani lokacin wani yakin soja na sabo, inda dalilin mutuwarsa ya kasance batun muhawara ta tarihi (guba ko dabi'a).
Ended the 1,100-year-old Byzantine Empir: Ya kawo karshen Daular Byzantine ta shekaru 1,100 sannan ya kafa Istanbul a matsayin sabon babban birnin Ottoman mai wadata.
Conquered vast territories in Anatolia a: Ya ci manyan yankuna da yaki a Anatolia da Balkans (ciki har da Serbia, Bosnia, da kuma Albania), wanda ya sauya kasar Ottoman ta zama babbar daula a duniya.
Issued the 'Kanunname,' a secular legal: Ya kaddamar da 'Kanunname,' tsarin doka (secular legal code) wando ya tsara iko a tsakiya sannan ya bayyana tsarin gwamnati da al'ummar Ottoman.
Established universities, invited Italia: Ya kafa jami'o'i, ya gayyaci masana na Italiya da Girka zuwa fadarsa, sannan ya samar da al'adu masu kyau na ilimi da fasaha a Istanbul.
Why was conquering Constantinople so imp: Me yasa cin Constantinople da yaki yake da matukar mahimmanci?
It was a huge symbolic victory, the fulf: Ya kasance babban nasara ta alama, cikar burin Musulunci da aka dade ana fata, kuma ya ba wa Ottomans ikon dabarar kasuwanci a kan hanyoyin kasuwanci masu mahimmanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsu na babban iko a duniya.
Was he tolerant of other religions?: Shin yana da hakuri da sauran addinai?
He showed a degree of pragmatism. After: Ya nuna wani mataki na zahiri. Bayan nasarar cin kasa da yaki, ya ba wa al'ummar Greek Orthodox, Armenian, da kuma Yahudawa damar kiyaye dokokin addininsu da cibiyoyinsu karkashin tsarin Millet, kodayake wadanda ba musulmai ba ana musu haraji na musamman.
The exact cause of his death in 1481 is: Ainihin dalilin mutuwarsa a shekarar 1481 yana da muhawara. Yayin da yake kan tafiyar soja, ba zato ba tsammani ya kamu da rashin lafiya sannan ya mutu. Wasu masana tarihi sun nuna cewa an ba shi guba ne, wataƙila ta hannun dansa na farko Bayezid ko kuma jami'an Venice, yayin da wasu ke gaskata cewa ya mutu ne sakamalon cuta ta dabi'a kamar gout.
Born in Salonica (now Thessaloniki, Gree: An haife shi a Salonica (Thessaloniki ta yanzu, Greece), Daular Usmaniyya.
Commands Ottoman forces to victory at th: Ya jagoranci sojojin Ottoman zuwa nasara a Yakin Gallipoli, wanda ya ba shi shahara ta kasa.
Initiates the Turkish War of Independenc: Ya kaddamar da Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish (Turkish War of Independence) yaki da dakarun Allied.
Establishes the Grand National Assembly: Ya kafa Grand National Assembly ta Turkey a Ankara.
Proclaims the Republic of Turkey and is: Ya shelanta Jamhuriyar Turkey sannan aka zabe shi a matsayin shugabanta na farko.
Initiates the replacement of the Arabic-: Ya kaddamar da musanya rubutun Ottoman Turkish na Larabci da haruffan Turkish na Latin.
Grants full universal suffrage to women: Ya ba wa mata cikakken hakkin zabe (universal suffrage) sannan majalisa ta ba shi sunan mahaifi 'Atatürk' (Uban Mutanen Turkey).
Dies in Dolmabahçe Palace, Istanbul, at: Ya mutu a Dolmabahçe Palace, Istanbul, yana da shekaru 57.
He led the Turkish National Movement to: Ya jagoranci Yunkurin Kasa na Turkish (Turkish National Movement) zuwa nasara yaki da mamayar Allied, wanda ya kare ikon cin gashin kanta na Turkey ta zamani.
He abolished the 600-year-old Ottoman Su: Ya soke Ottoman Sultanate ta shekaru 600 sannan ya kafa jamhuriya ta zamani (secular republic) a matsayinta.
He implemented a series of sweeping refo: Ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu yawa a siyasa, shari'a, harshe, ilimi, da al'adu don samar da kasa ta zamani.
He championed women's rights, granting T: Ya kare hakkin mata, inda ya ba wa mata na Turkey hakkin zabe a shekarar 1934, wanda ya rigayi kasashe da dama na Yamma.
It means 'Father of the Turks.' The Turk: Yana nufin 'Uban Mutanen Turkey.' Majalisar Dokoki ta Turkey ta ba shi wannan sunan a shekarar 1934 karkashin 'Dokar Sunan Mahaifi' (Surname Law), wadda ta bukaci daukacin mutane su karbi sunan mahaifi na gado.
Why did he replace the Arabic script wit: Me yasa ya musanya rubutun Larabci da haruffan Latin?
The reform was aimed at increasing liter: Gyaran yana da burin kara yawan mutane masu karatu da rubutu, domin sababbin haruffan suna da saukin koya sannan sun fi dacewa da sauti na harshen Turkish. Kuma mataki ne na alama na mayar da al'adun Turkey zuwa Yamma da kuma nisanta daga tarihin Ottoman da na Musulunci.
His rule is complex. He governed a singl: Mulkinsa yana da sarkakiya. Ya gudanar da mulkin jam'iyya daya sannan ya yi amfani da babban iko don aiwatar da gyare-gyare cikin sauri, wanda wasu ke kallo a matsayin na kama-karya. Sai dai, burinsa da ya bayyana shi ne kafa ginshikin demokradiyya ta gaba, kuma ana girmama shi a Turkey a matsayin wanda ya kafa kasar.
He was a staunch secularist. He believed: Ya kasance mai tsantsar ra'ayin raba addini da gwamnati (secularist). Ya yi imanin cewa addini al'amari ne na kashin kansa kuma ya kamata a raba shi gaba daya da rayuwar jama'a, siyasa, da doka. Wannan ka'ida, watau laïcite, ta zama ginshikin Jamhuriyar Turkey.
Born in Kavala, Ottoman Empire (now in G: An haife shi a Kavala, Daular Usmaniyya (yanzu a Greece).
Arrives in Egypt as second-in-command of: Ya isa Egypt a matsayin mataimakin kwamandan dakarun Albanian na sojojin Ottoman.
Appointed Wāli (governor) of Egypt by th: Sultan na Ottoman ya nada shi a matsayin Wali (gwamna) na Egypt bayan bukatar jama'a.
Consolidation of power by massacring the: Ya karfafa ikonsa ta hanyar kisan kiyashi na shugabannin Mamluk a Citadel da ke Alkahira.
Wages war against the Wahhabis in Arabia: Ya yi yaki yaki da Wahhabis a Arabia a madadin Sultan, wanda ya fadada tasirinsa.
Conquers Sudan, seeking gold, slaves, an: Ya ci Sudan da yaki, yana neman zinariya, bayi, da kuma dakarun soja na sabo.
Intervenes in the Greek War of Independe: Ya shiga cikin Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Greek (Greek War of Independence), amma sojojinsa na ruwa sun lalace a Yakin Navarino.
First Egyptian-Ottoman War. His son Ibra: Yakin Farko na Egyptian-Ottoman. Dansa Ibrahim Pasha ya ci Syria da yaki sannan ya ci gaba zuwa Anatolia.
Second Egyptian-Ottoman War. European in: Yakin Biyu na Egyptian-Ottoman. Shiga cikin maganar na Turai ya tilasta masa janyewa daga Syria amma ya ba wa iyalinsa mulkin gado na Egypt.
Steps down from power due to failing hea: Ya sauka daga mulki saboda rashin lafiya.
Founder of Modern Egypt: Wanda ya Kafa Kasar Egypt ta Zamani
Established a dynasty and implemented sw: Ya kafa daular sannan ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu yawa wadanda suka zamanantar da sojojin Egypt, tattalin arziki, da kuma al'umma.
Created a formidable, European-style con: Ya samar da sojoji masu karfi irin na Turai da kuma dakarun ruwa na zamani, wanda ya mayar da Egypt babban karfin soja a yankin.
Established state monopolies over agricu: Ya kafa ikon mallakar kasa na musamman (state monopolies) a kan noma da kasuwanci, musamman a kan auduga, don daukar nauyin gagarumin ayyukansa.
Sent educational missions to Europe and: Ya tura ayyukan ilimi zuwa Turai sannan ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa na tsakiya don gudanar da kasar yadda ya dace.
Was Muhammad Ali Egyptian?: Shin Muhammad Ali dan kasar Egypt ne?
No, he was an ethnic Albanian, born in K: A'a, shi dan asalin Albanian ne, an haife shi a Kavala a kasar Greece ta yanzu, wadda a lokacin take zama bangaren Daular Usmaniyya. Ya zo Egypt ne a matsayin sojan Ottoman kuma an ce bai taba koyon magana da harshen Larabci sosai ba.
Why is he called the 'founder of modern: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'wanda ya kafa kasar Egypt ta zamani'?
His reforms fundamentally transformed Eg: Gyare-gyarensu sun canza Egypt gaba daya daga lardin Ottoman da aka watsar zuwa kasa mai karfi da zaman kanta ta zahiri tare da rundunar soja mai karfi, gwamnati ta tsakiya, da kuma tattalin arziki na zamani, wanda ya kafa ginshikin kasar ta zamani.
Did he want to overthrow the Ottoman Sul: Shin yana son hambarar da Sultan na Ottoman ne?
While he fought two major wars against t: Duk da cewa ya yi manyan yakoki guda biyu yaki da Sultan sannan ya nemi samar da babbar daula ta kashin kansa, ainihin burinsa kila shi ne tabbatar da mulkin gado ga iyalinsa da kuma kafa kasa mai karfi da zaman kanta da ke da tsakiya a Egypt, maimakon ya karbi karagar mulki ta sarki a Istanbul da kansa.
An haife shi a wani kauye a Lower Egypt.
Enrolled at Al-Azhar University in Cairo: Ya shiga Jami'ar Al-Azhar da ke Alkahira.
Met his influential mentor, Jamal al-Din: Ya hadu da babban mai ba shi shawara, Jamal al-Din al-Afghani.
Exiled from Egypt for his support of the: An kore shi daga Egypt saboda goyon bayansa ga Bore na Urabi ('Urabi Revolt).
Co-founded the pan-Islamic journal 'Al-U: Ya samar da jaridar pan-Islamic 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa' tare a Paris.
Ya koma Egypt daga gudun hijira.
Appointed Grand Mufti of Egypt, the nati: An nada shi a matsayin Grand Mufti na Egypt, babban iko na kasa a kan shari'ar Musulunci.
He articulated a framework for reinterpr: Ya bayyana tsari na sake fassara ka'idojin Musulunci dangane da kalubale na zamani, yana jaddada hankali da dacewa.
He advocated for a modernized curriculum: Ya goyi bayan tsarin darussa na zamani a makarantun addini, ciki har da kimiyyar zamani, don samar da sabbin shugabanni nagari.
Legal Reform as Grand Mufti: Gyaran Shari'a a matsayin Grand Mufti
He issued progressive fatwas (legal opin: Ya kaddamar da fatawowi na ci gaba (fatwas) a kan batutuwa kamar kudin ruwa na banki da matsayin mata, yana amfani da ikonsa don aiwatar da canji.
His main goal was to reform Islamic thou: Babban burinsa shi ne ya gyara tunani da cibiyoyin Musulunci don tabbatar da cewa Musulunci yana tafiya da zamani, hankali, da kuma kimiyya, wanda hakan ya farfado da al'ummar musulmi karkashin matsin lamba na mulkin mallaka.
He was exiled for his connection to the: An tura shi gudun hijira saboda alakarsa da Bore na kasa na Urabi (1881-1882), wanda ke neman kawo karshen tasirin Birtaniya da Faransa a kan Egypt.
What is the difference between Abduh and: Menene bambanci tsakanin Abduh da mai ba shi shawara al-Afghani?
While both were reformers, al-Afghani wa: Duk da cewa duka biyun masu gyara ne, al-Afghani ya kasance dan siyasa na pan-Islamist mai tsauraran ra'ayi wanda ya mayar da hankali a kan juyin juya hali na yaki da mulkin mallaka. Bayan gudun hijirarsa, Abduh ya mayar da hankalinsa ga canji a hankali na dogon lokaci ta hanyar ilimi da gyaran shari'a daga cikin tsarin.
Born in the village of Ağırnas near Kays: An haife shi a kauyen Agirnas kusa da Kayseri, Anatolia.
Recruited into the Ottoman Janissary cor: An shigar da shi cikin rundunar Ottoman Janissary ta hanyar tsarin Devsirme.
Appointed as the Chief Imperial Architec: Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent ya nada shi a matsayin Babban Injiniyan Gine-gine na Sarki (Chief Imperial Architect).
